sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96210" key="staitw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σταιτ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n96210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like dough</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἐν τῷ ἄρτῳ ς</foreign>. the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soft, crumby</tr_> part of the loaf, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.93</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
